title: Technique Level 2
summary: G major and A minor scales, Hanon finger patterns, broken triads, and position shifts building on Level 1 technique.

exercises.title: G Major RH Ascent
exercises.summary: Right hand G major scale ascending.
exercises.goal: Play G major with an even touch and correct F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Major RH Descent
exercises.summary: Right hand G major scale descending.
exercises.goal: Descend G major smoothly with no hesitation on F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Major LH Ascent
exercises.summary: Left hand G major scale ascending in bass clef.
exercises.goal: Play the G major scale with the left hand, noting F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Major LH Descent
exercises.summary: Left hand G major scale descending.
exercises.goal: Descend the G major scale in bass clef evenly.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Natural Minor RH
exercises.summary: Right hand A natural minor scale ascending.
exercises.goal: Recognize and play the natural minor sound.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Natural Minor LH
exercises.summary: Left hand A natural minor scale ascending.
exercises.goal: Play A natural minor in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Hanon Pattern 1 RH
exercises.summary: Ascending eighth-note finger drill in the right hand.
exercises.goal: Build finger independence with an even eighth-note drill.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Hanon Pattern 1 LH
exercises.summary: Ascending eighth-note finger drill in the left hand.
exercises.goal: Build left-hand finger independence with the same drill.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Triad RH Broken
exercises.summary: Right hand G major broken triad pattern.
exercises.goal: Arpeggiate the G major triad cleanly.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Triad LH Broken
exercises.summary: Left hand G major broken triad pattern.
exercises.goal: Arpeggiate the G major triad with the left hand.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Position Shift RH
exercises.summary: Right hand shifts from C position to G position.
exercises.goal: Shift hand positions fluidly without pausing.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Repeated Note Speed RH
exercises.summary: Fast repeated notes on each finger of the right hand.
exercises.goal: Lift and replant each finger quickly for repeated notes.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Octave Reach RH
exercises.summary: Alternating low and high C, G, and E to practise large stretches.
exercises.goal: Land octave leaps accurately without tension.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Technique Level 2 Checkpoint
exercises.summary: G major melody combining scales, skips, and eighth notes.
exercises.goal: Apply all Level 2 techniques in a flowing G major passage.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Technique Level 2 Finale
exercises.summary: Full G major run with a descent and cadence.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate fluency across the full G major scale range.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
